description: Code cleanup: fix all ruff F401 unused imports found in the codebase and remove dead code file
steps: In app/db/database.py line 9: remove APP_DIR_NAME from the import statement (keep get_runtime_paths)
In app/ui/entity_notes_dialog.py line 27: remove ENTITY_TYPE_LABELS from the import block (keep the other imports)
Delete app/ui/player_note_dialog.py entirely - it contains only unused re-export aliases (PlayerNoteDialog, PlayerNoteFormData) with no consumers anywhere in the project
In app/services/coach_tasks.py line 4: remove 'from datetime import datetime' - it is imported but not used
In app/ui/tournaments_view.py line 8: remove QHeaderView from the import block
Run 'ruff check app/ --select F401' and confirm zero errors remain
Run 'python -m mypy app' and confirm it still passes cleanly
Run 'python -m pytest -q -rs' and confirm all tests still pass
acceptance_criteria: ruff check app/ --select F401 returns zero errors
python -m mypy app reports 'Success: no issues found in 46 source files' (or 45 if player_note_dialog.py deletion reduces count - mypy ignores ui/ anyway)
python -m compileall app -q succeeds with no errors
findings: All 5 unused imports removed (6 F401 violations across 5 files, one file deleted entirely). ruff F401 clean, mypy clean (46 source files), pytest 151 passed, compileall success.
